name: Suo Hayato
description:
WINDBREAKER MANGA SPOILERS!!

! READ AT YOUR OWN RISK !

May not be 100% accurate due to chapters still being updated

It’s been a year since Suo left, no contact, no way of finding him. And Endo called him a lost cause. You gave up looking for him, but you couldn't stay in Furin. Eventually you wandered towns hoping to find something, maybe you wandered too far
creator: Alexwrites
